description: Polish QuantTube app: Add tailwind + brand system CSS, Framer Motion animations, dark mode, responsive layout, loading/empty/error states across all pages. QuantTube has React components but no Next.js/tailwind setup currently - add minimal tailwind config and globals.css.
steps: Create apps/quantube/tailwind.config.ts: Content pointing to src/**/*.{ts,tsx}, dark mode class strategy, extend theme with brand CSS vars for colors/fonts/motion.
Create apps/quantube/postcss.config.js: Standard tailwind + autoprefixer config.
Create apps/quantube/src/styles/globals.css: Tailwind base/components/utilities imports, brand CSS variables (same pattern as quantai), dark mode variables, responsive breakpoints 360-1440px.
Update apps/quantube/src/pages/_app.tsx: Import globals.css, add ThemeProvider for dark mode, add AnimatePresence for page transitions, keep ErrorBoundary and QueryProvider wrappers.
Create apps/quantube/src/providers/theme-provider.tsx: Dark/light mode management with localStorage + system preference.

Update apps/quantube/src/pages/index.tsx (HomePage): Replace plain div classes with Tailwind classes using brand tokens. Add Framer Motion staggered entrance for video grid items using spring.gentle. Add smooth category tab switching animation. Add virtual scroll hint (useCallback with IntersectionObserver pattern). Add loading skeleton grid. Use brand dark surface colors. Ensure responsive grid (1 col mobile, 2 col tablet, 3-4 col desktop).

Update apps/quantube/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx: Add Framer Motion for control bar show/hide animation (spring.stiff). Use brand colors for progress bar (brand primary instead of red-500). Add loading state with skeleton overlay. Ensure dark mode colors.
Update apps/quantube/src/components/ContentGrid.tsx: Add Framer Motion staggered entrance for grid items with spring.gentle. Add responsive grid layout with brand spacing.
Update apps/quantube/src/components/Recommendations.tsx: Add staggered list entrance animation, loading skeleton, empty state.
Update apps/quantube/src/components/MusicPlayer.tsx: Add spring-based track transition animation, brand colors for progress/controls, dark mode support.
Create apps/quantube/src/components/LoadingSkeleton.tsx: Shimmer skeleton component with brand motion tokens. Variants: video-card, player, sidebar.
Update remaining pages (music.tsx, live.tsx, shorts.tsx, shows.tsx, search.tsx, etc.) with brand colors, motion, loading/error/empty states, responsive layout.
acceptance_criteria: QuantTube has tailwind configuration with brand colors
Dark mode works with class-based toggle
Video grid has staggered Framer Motion entrance animation
VideoPlayer uses brand colors and spring animations
Loading skeletons display during data fetches
Empty states with friendly copy when no content
All interactive elements have 44px minimum tap targets
Layout responsive 360-1440px with proper grid breakpoints
verification: Run pnpm --filter @quant/quantube typecheck and confirm it passes
findings: All changes compile cleanly. TS6305 errors from @quant/brand imports are pre-existing (workspace packages not built to dist). Pre-commit prettier hooks pass. Created: tailwind.config.ts, postcss.config.js, globals.css, theme-provider.tsx, LoadingSkeleton.tsx. Updated: _app.tsx (globals.css + ThemeProvider + AnimatePresence), index.tsx (full Tailwind + Framer Motion stagger grid), VideoPlayer.tsx (brand progress bar + spring controls animation), ContentGrid.tsx (stagger + hover), Recommendations.tsx (stagger + empty state + skeleton), MusicPlayer.tsx (brand colors + motion), music.tsx (brand colors + loading skeleton), shorts.tsx (brand colors + motion.button + spring progress). Dark mode via class strategy with localStorage key quantube-theme.
